hero_match.title: Sheffield Shield Final (2025-26 Season Concluding)
hero_match.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

summary: The search indicates the 2025-26 Sheffield Shield season is scheduled to conclude today, March 29, 2026. The AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 has already concluded. No matches were found for Chandigarh T20. The SONY SPORTS TEN 1 HD stream is assigned as the hero stream for the concluding cricket event.
